basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Raipur has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Chhattisgarh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / B. Pharm or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine or from a recognized University or equivalent
qualification.details: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / B. Pharm or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine or from a recognized University or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Raipur Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Associate-I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / B. Pharm or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine or from a recognized University or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Raipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I position at NIT Raipur is 12th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a four years Bachelor's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences, or a Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences, or BVSc, B. Pharm, or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Technology, or Medicine from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate-I post ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 20% HRA for GATE/NET qualified candidates, or Rs. 30,000 plus 20% HRA for those without GATE/NET.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at the National Institute of Technology Raipur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIT Raipur Project Associate-I recruitment must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITRR/ECE/3019.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate-I position is scheduled to be held on 13th July 2026.
